whatsNew: All Mate apps are now restricted to content for the learner’s selected course.
Added separate Bricklayer, Site Carpentry and Architectural Joinery calculations, tasks, materials, faults and quote templates.
Every Mate app now uses Quick Tools, Saved Work and Help sections.
MeasureMate includes five course-specific calculation types per course.
MaterialMate includes course-specific materials, wastage, pack sizes and costs.
FixMate includes five common faults and repair checks per course.
SafeMate includes course-specific tasks and additional hazard checks.
QuoteMate adds course job templates, overheads, profit, VAT and deposit calculations.
Saved Mate work is stored separately for each course.
